decisions.value: .NET 10 LTS; target net10.0-windows; use the latest approved 10.0 patch and review upgrade before 2028-11-14

decisions.topic: supported Windows versions and CPU architecture
decisions.value: Experiment support is Windows 11 x64 only; production support expansion requires a separate decision and test matrix
View(XAML) -> ViewModel -> Application use case -> Domain -> Persistence port; no SQL or domain decisions in View/ViewModel

decisions.topic: dependency injection, configuration, logging, exception handling
decisions.value: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection; JSON plus command-line configuration; Microsoft.Extensions.Logging; application-level fatal handler and use-case error mapping

decisions.topic: RDB provider and data access style
decisions.value: Microsoft.Data.Sqlite with explicit parameterized SQL and hand-written row mapping; no EF migration and no schema creation

decisions.topic: transaction, isolation, timeout, retry, null, collation, time and decimal semantics
decisions.value: Single writer; explicit atomic transactions for multi-statement writes; foreign_keys=ON; busy timeout 5000 ms with no blind retry; preserve NULL and SQLite default collation; preserve UTC/user-time/offset columns without normalization

decisions.topic: unit, integration, UI and acceptance test entry points
decisions.value: xUnit domain/unit tests; integration tests against a fresh copy of baseline SQLite; UI smoke plus approved screenshot/interaction evidence; canonical SQL and DB integrity after writes
Self-contained win-x64 ZIP for the experiment; unsigned; manual replacement update; include GPL-3.0 license, notices, source offer/instructions, and rollback package
